title: WHERE clause erroneously influences value of fetched column from view
poc: CREATE VIEW v0(c0) AS SELECT LOWER(CAST('1e500' AS TEXT)) FROM t0;
SELECT v0.c0 FROM v0, t0 WHERE t0.rowid NOT IN (0, 0, v0.c0);
key_bug_features: WHERE clause affects fetched column value from view
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(c1 INTEGER, c2 TEXT, c3 REAL);
INSERT INTO t1(c1, c2, c3) VALUES (1, '1e500', 3.14);
CREATE VIEW v1(c1) AS SELECT LOWER(CAST(c2 AS TEXT)) FROM t1 WHERE c3 IS NOT NULL;
INSERT INTO t1(c1, c2, c3) VALUES (2, NULL, NULL);
SELECT v1.c1 FROM v1, t1 WHERE t1.c1 NOT IN (1, 2, v1.c1);
